# Pull Request Template

## Description
Please include a brief summary of the changes and the related issue/ticket.

## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat`: A new feature
- [ ] `fix`: A bug fix
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation updates
- [ ] `refactor`: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `test`: Adding or modifying tests
- [ ] `chore`: Settle dependencies, configuration, or build pipeline

## Verification Plan

### Automated Tests
- Run `flutter analyze`
- Run `flutter test`

### Manual Verification
- Describe how these changes were manually tested.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (specified in `.cursor/rules/`).
- [ ] I have run `dart format` on all modified files.
- [ ] `flutter analyze` reports zero warnings, lints, or errors.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass.
- [ ] Relevant documentation has been updated.
